propositions: Containerize the long-running auto-lander loop service and deploy it as a single docker-compose instance on the Gerrit box with an autoheal sidecar and flock single-writer guard.
The service must log to its own service logs and never write session_log, with all failure modes (hang, error, stuck, lander_down) visible via metrics and alarms.
Provision credentials via SSM token and grant the bot Rebase access on the rebar project refs/heads/*.
Provide liveness and crash-safe recovery: HEALTHCHECK, 15s-poll heartbeat file with lander_down at age > 90s, emergency-stop sentinel, and drain-on-SIGTERM recovery record.
A read-only HTTP status endpoint exposes heartbeat_age_s and queue status, and a time-in-phase alarm fires when a wipChain stays non-idle for over 45 minutes.

Ticket closed as superseded by ADR-0047: the auto-lander was built and landed but retired the same day after a bug where the non-sticky Autosubmit label was dropped by the bot's own rebase, stalling landings under concurrent traffic.
